gpu: AMD Radeon RX 6700 XT (navy_flounder, LLVM 14.0.0, DRM 3.48, 6.0.5-200.fc36.x86_64)

notes: Game runs fine, and you are able to get to the main menu and start the game. However once you start playing the controls don't work. The game has no controller support. Tried remapping the controls in the Deck settings for the game, as well as an external keyboard and mouse. No luck getting either to work.
